html:
Exclusive to:  

The Gnome has a 4.17% chance of being found when digging up a grave. It can be found outside of Graves in the Box Thing set piece. It has a 1% chance to drop from Splumonkey Pods or Prime Ape Huts in the Shipwrecked DLC.

It can be traded to the Pig King for 5 Gold Nuggets.

The Gnome can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_4".

×5

×10

×3

Trivia

  • Under the old research method, Trinkets were one of the best ways of gaining research points (80 points).

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

Don't Starve
Together
Gnome
Source
Dropped by
:
Miscellaneous
"trinket_4"
Exclusive to:
“It must be some kind of religious artifact.”
–Wilson
“He looks like he was forged in flame.”
–Willow
“Is junk, I think.”
–Wolfgang
“I'd carry this to the end of the world.”
–Wendy
“HEY SCIENTIST THIS HORRIBLE JUNK LOOKS JUST LIKE YOU”
–WX-78
“What a positively, delightfully odd little fellow.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't ask me.”
–Woodie
“Don't look at me like that.”
–Maxwell
“How strange. Who would need such things here?”
–Wagstaff
“A peculiar small man.”
–Wigfrid
“It's watching us.”
–Webber
“Gnome thanks, that thing's creepy.”
–Walani
“Somewhere there's a lawn that misses you.”
–Warly
“Red hatted devil!”
–Woodlegs
“HAHA! 'TIS TEENY LITTLE GUY!”
–Wilba
“Pointy hat”
–Wormwood
“Pity I don't have a lawn to put it on.”
–Wheeler
“Looks like my old landlord. Ha!”
–Winona
“I see no soul within, no no.”
–Wortox
“Weird tiny man.”
–Wurt
“Is it just me, or do his eyes follow me around?”
–Walter
“Oooh, I do love a good knickknack.”
–Wanda
The Gnome has a 4.17% chance of being found when digging up a grave. It can be found outside of Graves in the Box Thing set piece. It has a 1% chance to drop from Splumonkey Pods or Prime Ape Huts in the Shipwrecked DLC.
It can be traded to the Pig King for 5 Gold Nuggets.
The Gnome can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_4".
